patch:
--- a/keel.toml
+++ b/keel.toml
@@ -3,5 +3,7 @@
 [target."api.example.com"]
 timeout = "9s"   # user tuning survives
 
-[target."api.gone.example"]  # stale
-timeout = "5s"
+[target."api.new.example"]           # seen in: app.mjs:3
+timeout = "30s"
+retry   = { attempts = 3, schedule = "exp(200ms, x2, max 30s, jitter)", on = ["conn", "timeout", "429", "5xx"] }
+breaker = { failures = 5, cooldown = "15s" }
